title: geum × pulchrum
intro: Geum × pulchrum, also known as the Avens plant, is a hybrid species of the Geum genus, characterized by its distinctive flowers with a yellow center and red or pink petals. The Avens plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Geum × pulchrum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a potential natural remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Geum × pulchrum can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
